ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sustainability_reporting_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting requirement */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting requirement */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the requirement applies to */,
  "reporting_framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting framework the requirement belongs to */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the requirement is mandatory or optional */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the requirement must be reported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data expected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_frameworks" (
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting framework */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting framework */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting framework */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reporting framework */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the framework was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "csrd_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CSRD objective */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the CSRD objective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CSRD objective */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the objective */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_sector" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting requirement */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_framework" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting requirement */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting framework */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id", "framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_objective" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting requirement */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CSRD objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id", "objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, report manager, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company submitting the report */,
  "reporting_framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting framework used */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reporting_framework_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_framework_id") REFERENCES reporting_frameworks ("framework_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting requirement the data satisfies */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the reported data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_data_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES sustainability_reporting_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assurance provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the assurance provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assurance provider */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assurance_provided" (
  "assurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assurance event */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assurance provider */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being assured */,
  "assurance_date" TEXT /* Date the assurance was provided */,
  "assurance_type" TEXT /* Type of assurance provided */,
  "assurance_method" TEXT /* Method used for assurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assurance_provided_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES assurance_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assurance_provided_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_benefit_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost-benefit analysis */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the analysis belongs to */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the reporting process */,
  "benefit" REAL /* Benefit of the reporting process */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the cost-benefit analysis */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_benefit_analysis_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being verified */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the report was verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date the verification was performed */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the report */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting progress event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being tracked */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress made toward reporting */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone achieved in the reporting process */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes on the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_progress_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being evaluated */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation result */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
